title: Xeranthemum dealbatum
taxonomy: Xeranthemum dealbatum is classified as a species within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification places it among the flowering plants, specifically within the order Asterales. The genus Xeranthemum is a small group of plants native to the Mediterranean region. The species Xeranthemum dealbatum is a type of annual or short-lived perennial plant. Its classification is further refined by its unique characteristics, such as its delicate appearance and short-lived blooms.
